name: AB Volvo
description: AB Volvo is a leading global manufacturer of trucks, buses, construction equipment, and marine and industrial engines. Headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden, the Group provides complete solutions for financing and service, focusing on sustainable transport and infrastructure solutions. Its portfolio includes brands such as Volvo Trucks, Mack Trucks, Renault Trucks, and Volvo Construction Equipment. The company is a pioneer in the transition to electrified and autonomous vehicles, aiming to drive prosperity through transport and infrastructure solutions that are essential for any society to thrive.
